subject: Viridian Forest, a dense woodland scene with tall trees and light filtering through the canopy
description: A lush, dense forest scene fills the frame. Tall trees with full canopies tower overhead, their trunks rising from a green undergrowth. Diffuse natural light filters through the canopy creating a dappled, atmospheric quality. The scene is entirely natural with no figures present — just the layered depth of a classic woodland interior. The mood is tranquil and immersive.
